prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为 3090→3822→4662→5382→6240，呈持续后移趋势，近 5 年累计后移约 3150 名，近 3 年累计后移约 1578 名；2025 年基准约 6240 名，后移速度未见放缓；本省物理类计划 2021 年 47 人、2022 年 43 人、2023 年 43 人、2024 年 46 人、2025 年 39 人；2026 年计划 42 人，较 2025 年扩招约 7.7%，扩招对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 42 名，近年排名稳定在 42–46 名区间，学校层次对考生吸引力保持平稳；2023 年声誉评价偏负面（新闻传播学类专业位次大幅下滑），但近年无明显新增负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 97、评价「一般」，短视频曝光量偏低，未形成明显报考助推效应；应用经济学 A、理论经济学 A-，均为财经类核心学科，对相关专业报考有稳定支撑；但 A- 及以上仅 2 个，学科集群效应有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类 2021–2024 年从「推荐」转为「分化观望」，热度整体降温；本省物理类考生 2025 年约 19.2 万，2026 年估算约 20.4 万（增长约 6.2%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；学校位于北京，属跨省报考，福建省非该校本地生源大省。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（7.7%）与考生增长（约 6.2%）基本对冲、专业热度分化观望、学校声誉平稳等因素，在 2025 年基准 6240 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 6558 名，区间 6058–7058 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学类（含金融工程、金融科技）
- 经济学类（澄明书院）（含数理经济与数理金融等）
- 金融科技（北航计算机联培）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 统计学类（含统计学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（含会计学、财务管理、审计学）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、人工智能）
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学、资产评估）
- 投资学（含与大数据双学位项目）
- 精算学
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 经济学类（智能经济）（含经济学、国民经济管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 6558 名，区间 6058–7058 名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力（统计学类、会计学院、计算机类），一档（金融学类、澄明书院）作为冲刺，三档（财政学类、投资学、精算学）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<6058）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>7058）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 3090→3822→4662→5382→6240, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3150 places in the past 5 years and about 1578 places in the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 6240, and the backward speed has not slowed down; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 47 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 39 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 42, an increase of about 7.7% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked about 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 42–46 range in recent years, with the school level maintaining a steady attraction for candidates; in 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (the ranking of Journalism and Communication majors dropped significantly), but there have been no significant new negative public opinions in recent years; Douyin heat overall ranking 97th, evaluation 'average', short video exposure is relatively low, not forming a significant boost to applications; Applied Economics A, Theoretical Economics A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, providing stable support for related major applications; but only 2 disciplines at A- or above, with limited disciplinary cluster effect.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Finance/Accounting/Economics category shifted from 'recommended' to 'divergent wait-and-see' from 2021 to 2024, with overall cooling popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province was about 192,000 in 2025, estimated at about 204,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 6.2%), with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying competition; the school is located in Beijing, which is a cross-province application, and Fujian Province is not a major source of local students for this school.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (7.7%) and candidate growth (about 6.2%) basically offset each other, the divergent wait-and-see attitude towards major popularity, and the stable school reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 6240; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6558, with a range of 6058–7058.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Finance (including Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Economics (Chengming Academy) (including Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance, etc.)
- Financial Technology (Joint Training with Beihang University Computer Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Statistics (including Statistics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (including Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Finance (including Public Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation)
- Investment (including Dual Degree Program with Big Data)
- Actuarial Science
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Economics (Intelligent Economy) (including Economics, National Economic Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6558, range 6058–7058. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Statistics, Accounting School, Computer Science) as the main force, Tier 1 (Finance, Chengming Academy) as a sprint, and Tier 3 (Public Finance, Investment, Actuarial Science) as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6058), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>7058), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年招生计划持平、考生增长约 6.2% 加剧竞争、专业热度分化观望等因素，在 2025 年基准 1134 名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约 1154 名，区间 981–1327 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（含会计学、财务管理、审计学）
- 金融学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学（含与会计学双学位、与工管双学位等 4 个专业）
- 财政学类（含财政学、税收学、资产评估）
- 经济学类（智能经济）（含经济学、国民经济管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理类（商学院）（含工商管理、市场营销、人力资源管理、供应链管理）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 1154 名，区间 981–1327 名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力（法学、财政学类、经济学类），一档（会计学院、金融学）作为冲刺，三档（商学院、文化产业管理、外语类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<981）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>1327）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 857→1014→1051→1205→1134, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 277 places over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1134, a slight recovery from 2024 (1205); the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 18 in 2021, 20 each in 2022–2024, and 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, and the school's level maintains a steady appeal to liberal arts candidates; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (significant decline in rankings for Journalism and Communication majors), but no significant new negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin heat overall ranking 97th, rated 'average', without forming an obvious boost to applications; Applied Economics A, Theoretical Economics A-, both core disciplines in finance and economics, providing stable support for related liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Accounting/Economics categories have shifted from 'recommended' to 'differentiated wait-and-see', with overall cooling popularity; the number of provincial History Category candidates was approximately 60,000 in 2025, estimated at about 64,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 6.2%), with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, involving cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating downward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the approximately 6.2% increase in candidates intensifying competition, and the differentiated wait-and-see in major popularity, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1134; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1154, with a range of 981–1327.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Business Administration (School of Accounting) (including Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Law (including dual degrees with Accounting, dual degrees with Business Administration, etc., 4 majors)
- Finance and Taxation (including Finance, Taxation, Asset Appraisal)
- Economics (Smart Economy) (including Economics, National Economic Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (School of Business) (including Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Cultural Industry Management
- Foreign Languages and Literature (Financial English, Financial Translation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1154, range 981–1327. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Law, Finance and Taxation, Economics) as the main target, Tier 1 (School of Accounting, Finance) as a reach, and Tier 3 (School of Business, Cultural Industry Management, Foreign Languages) as safety. Candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (<981) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the upper bound (>1327) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 with Tier 2 as supplement.

_translation.university_name_en: Central University of Finance and Economics
